---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    theme: none
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    background: #f0ece4;
    color: #2e2825;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }

  a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }

  /* NAV */
  .nav {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1.5rem 4rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #c9c2b6;
    background: #f0ece4;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 10;
  }
  .nav-logo { font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a3b35; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: #8a8278;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
    transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover {
    color: #2e2825;
    background: #e8e3da;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .nav-links a.active { color: #2e2825; border-bottom: 1px solid #7a3b35; }
  .nav-cta {
    background: #2e2825; color: #f0ece4;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem; font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: #7a3b35; }

  /* PAGE HEADER */
  .page-header {
    padding: 5rem 4rem 3rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #c9c2b6;
  }
  .page-label {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: #7a3b35;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .page-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    color: #2e2825;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .page-title .outlined {
    -webkit-text-stroke: 1px #2e2825;
    color: transparent;
  }
  .page-sub {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: #6b6560;
    max-width: 600px;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  /* BLOG GRID */
  .blog-section { padding: 4rem; }
  .blog-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .blog-card {
    background: #e8e3da;
    border: 1px solid #c9c2b6;
    padding: 2rem;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .blog-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(46,40,37,0.1);
  }
  .blog-num {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900;
    color: #c9c2b6; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .blog-tag {
    font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #7a3b35; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .blog-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: #2e2825; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .blog-desc {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: #8a8278;
    line-height: 1.7; flex-grow: 1; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }
  .blog-footer {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center; padding-top: 1rem;
    border-top: 1px solid #c9c2b6;
  }
  .blog-date { font-size: 0.65rem; color: #8a8278; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
  .blog-link {
    font-size: 0.7rem; color: #7a3b35;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #c9a09b; padding-bottom: 1px;
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .blog-link:hover { color: #2e2825; border-color: #2e2825; }

  /* FOOTER */
  .footer-bar {
    margin: 0 4rem;
    padding: 2rem 0;
    border-top: 1px solid #c9c2b6;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 0.7rem; color: #8a8278;
  }

  @media (max-width: 800px) {
    .nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .page-header, .blog-section { padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    .blog-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-bar { margin: 0 1.5rem; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
  }
</style>

<!-- NAV -->
<div class="nav">
  <span class="nav-logo">Eesha Jagdhane // Portfolio</span>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="blogs.html" class="active">Blogs &amp; Insights</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="index.html#contact" class="nav-cta">Get in touch</a>
</div>

<!-- PAGE HEADER -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-title">Blogs &amp; <span class="outlined">Insights</span></div>
  <p class="page-sub">
    A collection of assignments, analyses, and reflections from my Marketing Analytics
    coursework at UC San Diego.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- BLOG CARDS -->
<div class="blog-section">
  <div class="blog-grid">

    <div class="blog-card">
      <div class="blog-num">01</div>
      <div class="blog-tag">revealjs Exploration</div>
      <div class="blog-title">FIFA 2026 World Cup Winner Prediction</div>
      <div class="blog-desc">Who will win the 2026 FIFA World Cup and why? An analysis of squad depth, big-game experience, tactical flexibility, and match-winning ability — and why France is my pick.</div>
      <div class="blog-footer">
        <span class="blog-date">April 6, 2026</span>
        <a href="worldcup.html" class="blog-link">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="blog-card">
      <div class="blog-num">02</div>
      <div class="blog-tag">Assignment 1 — Statistics</div>
      <div class="blog-title">A/B Testing a Call to Action</div>
      <div class="blog-desc">Exploring A/B testing through simulation — covering the Law of Large Numbers, Bootstrap Standard Errors, the Central Limit Theorem, Hypothesis Testing, and the problem with peeking.</div>
      <div class="blog-footer">
        <span class="blog-date">April 15, 2026</span>
        <a href="blogs/HW1/hw1_index.html" class="blog-link">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="blog-card">
      <div class="blog-num">03</div>
      <div class="blog-tag">Assignment 2 — Econometrics</div>
      <div class="blog-title">Card &amp; Krueger (1994) Replication</div>
      <div class="blog-desc">Replicating key tables from the New Jersey minimum wage natural experiment using the public-use fast-food survey data: FTE construction, NJ/PA comparisons, and a simple DiD-style visualization.</div>
      <div class="blog-footer">
        <span class="blog-date">April 22, 2026</span>
        <a href="blogs/HW2/hw2_answers.html" class="blog-link">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<div class="footer-bar">
  <span>© 2026 Eesha Jagdhane</span>
  <span style="color: #7a3b35;">Built with Quarto</span>
  <span>San Diego, CA</span>
</div>
```
